title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions family as a Backend Developer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions:
Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital Ventures Solutions!
